paper_title: Evalita-LLM: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Italian
evaluation_method: Multi-prompt evaluation benchmark for Italian LLMs covering ten native Italian tasks. The evalita_mp group includes both perplexity-based (multiple-choice) and generative tasks. Multiple-choice tasks include: Textual Entailment (TE), Sentiment Analysis (SA), Word in Context (WiC), Hate Speech Detection (HS), Admission Tests (AT), FAQ. Generative tasks include: Summarization, Lexical Substitution, Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction. Each task is evaluated against multiple prompts to mitigate sensitivity. Multiple-choice tasks use accuracy via log-likelihood; generative tasks use task-specific metrics (e.g., ROUGE for summarization).
metric: accuracy (multiple-choice tasks) and task-specific metrics (generative tasks)
